service.name: Tx Power
service.informativeText: Abstract: This service exposes a device's current transmit power level when in a connection. Summary: The Tx Power service is instantiated as a Primary Service. There is only one instance of the Tx Power service on a device. There is exactly one instance of the Tx Power Level characteristic

characteristic.name: Tx Power Level
characteristic.informativeText:
Abstract: The Transmit Power Level characteristic represents the current transmit power level in dBm, and the level ranges from -100 dBm to +20 dBm to a resolution of 1 dBm.
Summary: The value of the characteristic is a signed 8 bit integer that has a fixed point exponent of 0.
Examples: The value 0x12 is interpreted as +18dBm The value 0xEE is interpreted as -18dBm
